mission.title: atlantis: /api/plan does not create workspace if it does not exist
mission.description: /api/plan does not create workspace if it does not exist. This issue affects 21+ users.

steps.title: Identify atlantis troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your atlantis deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review atlantis configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis
```
### Community Note

* Please vote on this issue by adding a 👍 [reaction](https://blog.github.com/2016-03-10-add-reactions-to-pull-requests-issues-and-comments/) to the original issue to help the community and maintainers prioritize this request.

steps.title: Apply the fix for /api/plan does not create workspace if it does not exist
steps.description:
## what

Fix https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/2949 by cloning the working dir before processing plan/apply api call.

## why

As reported in https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/2949, when calling plan/apply from api, if the target workingdir has not been cloned by atlantis,
```yaml
{"Repository":"jamengual/atlantmos","Ref":"main","Type":"Github","PR":0,"Projects":null,"Paths":[{"Directory":"components/terraform/null-resource","Workspace":"pepe-ue2-lab"}]}
```

steps.title: Confirm /api/plan does not create workspace if it does… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
## what

Fix https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/2949 by cloning the working dir before processing plan/apply api call.

## why

As reported in https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/2949, when calling plan/apply from api, if the target workingdir has not been cloned by atlantis, an error occurs and plan/apply cannot be performed.

</details>
